error_signature: Loop over node only passes 1 item
title: Loop Over Node only processes one item
symptom: The Loop Over node is only passing one item to the next node instead of all items provided by the previous node.
applies_when: Multiple items are generated by the previous node
not_this_if: Loop Over node is correctly connected back to itself
root_cause: The Loop Over node requires a connection back to its starting point to iterate over multiple items. Without this connection, it will only process the first item and terminate.
fix_steps: Connect the output of the Debug - Logger node back to the input of the Loop Over node
Ensure the connection is made at the starting point of the Loop Over node
agent_instruction: Connect the Debug - Logger node back to the Loop Over node to enable iteration over all items.
